## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what is this PR adding/changing? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Add new paper / tool entry
- [ ] Fix broken link or metadata
- [ ] Format / style cleanup
- [ ] New section or structural change
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Entry follows the [format template](../CONTRIBUTING.md#entry-format)
- [ ] Date is in `[YYYY-MM]` form, based on first public release
- [ ] 1–3 tags chosen from the taxonomy in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] Placed in the correct section, sorted by date (newest first)
- [ ] All links resolve
- [ ] No duplicate of an existing entry
- [ ] `npx awesome-lint` passes locally (if you ran it)
